name: printforge-dev
description: Root dev launcher — runs backend (mock mode) + frontend together for isolated testing without touching the Pi.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PRINTFORGE_MOCK_SERIAL=1 PRINTFORGE_GCODE_DIR=./.dev-data/gcodes PRINTFORGE_DATA_DIR=./.dev-data/data python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir printforge/backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:real: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir printforge/backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "cd printforge/frontend && npm run dev"
